name: Chronomaly Winged Sphinx
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>先史遺産</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オーパーツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウィングス・スフィンクス
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 5 "Chronomaly" monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except "Chronomaly" monsters.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 5 "Chronomaly" monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except "Chronomaly" monsters.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 5 "Chronomaly" monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except "Chronomaly" monsters.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
